notAllowed: Youre not allowed to use that command.
joinRemoved: You will no longer be pinged.
remindTargetDisabled: {{target}} is not accepting reminders, tell them to run "?remindme on".
remindToggleOff: you can no longer receive reminders
helpText:
## This is a bot by mcfe that was built to keep track of the powerup ping list
-# it does not collect any personal data or messages beyond user ids and commands you run.
-# it does not log any messages beyond commands and its own

?help - show this text
?mcfe - ping mcfe (great idea jay)
?mentions - show current mentions as a code block (no pings)
?join - add yourself to the ping
?leave - remove yourself from the ping
?stats - show general statistics
?time [add|edit|remove|<user>] - time management (use abbreviation or exact hh:mm)
?time [user] - show the saved time for a user
?remindme <on|off> - toggle receiving reminders
?remind <user> <message> - send a reminder to a user, can be yourself
?add <mentions|whitelist|reminders> <user> - add to lists (whitelisted; owner for whitelist/reminders)
?remove @user - remove a mention target (whitelisted)
?message <edit|remove|[display]> - message options (whitelisted)
?whitelist - show whitelisted users
?restart - restart bot (mcfe only)
jayLines: <@850976200562311168> youre beautiful and smart and funny and talented and kind and amazing and lovable and wonderful and incredible and brave and just all around my favourite person in the world and you deserve all the good things in the world and im very glad to have met you
<@850976200562311168> i wish you a good day
<@850976200562311168> you are very important to me
<@850976200562311168> i cant wait to meet you
timeInvalid: invalid time/timezone. use hh:mm (am/pm) or an abbreviation like pst/cet/jst
editNoReply: provide a message id to edit
editNotFound: message not found in this channel
deleteNoReply: provide a message id to delete
deleteNotFound: message not found in this channel
